name: Shining Hope Road
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>輝望道</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シャイニング・ホープ・ロード</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 3 monsters in your Graveyard; Special Summon all 3, but their effects are negated. Immediately after this effect resolves, Xyz Summon 1 "Utopia" or "Utopic" Xyz Monster using only those 3 monsters. You cannot Special Summon other monsters during the turn you activate this card.
eff: Target 3 monsters in your Graveyard; Special Summon all 3, but their effects are negated. Immediately after this effect resolves, Xyz Summon 1 "Utopia" or "Utopic" Xyz Monster using only those 3 monsters. You cannot Special Summon other monsters during the turn you activate this card.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
